# {{BRAND_NAME}} — Full Brand Knowledge Base

This file is the long-form `/llms-full.txt` companion to `/llms.txt`. It gives LLMs complete context they can cite accurately. Keep it factual. No marketing superlatives.

---

## 10. Security and compliance

- Hosting: {{HOSTING_PROVIDER}} ({{DATA_RESIDENCY}})

- Authorization: {{AUTHZ_MODEL}}
